I

ICON_BACKWARD - Static variable in interface org.docgene.help.HelpContentViewer
"backward": The key for the backward icon.
ICON_FORWARD - Static variable in interface org.docgene.help.HelpContentViewer
"forward": The key for the forward icon.
ICON_GLOSSARY - Static variable in interface org.docgene.help.HelpContentViewer
"glossary": The key for the glossary icon.
ICON_HOME - Static variable in interface org.docgene.help.HelpContentViewer
"home": The key for the home icon.
install(HelpContentViewer<?, ?>) - Method in class org.docgene.help.JavaHelpFactory
Install the Help content in the HelpContentViewer.
installModel(ArticlesModel) - Method in class org.docgene.help.gui.jfx.JFXHelpContentViewer
Install the Help content in the HelpContentViewer.
installModel(ArticlesModel) - Method in class org.docgene.help.gui.swing.SwingHelpContentViewer
Install the Help content in the HelpContentViewer.
installModel(ArticlesModel) - Method in interface org.docgene.help.HelpContentViewer
Install the Help content in the HelpContentViewer.
invokeBlocking(Runnable) - Method in class org.docgene.help.gui.swing.SwingJFXEngineManager
 
isAcceptingDuplicates() - Method in class org.docgene.help.gui.autocomplete.AutoCompleteDictionary
Return true if the dictionnary accept duplicates.
isAcceptingDuplicates() - Method in class org.docgene.help.gui.jfx.autocomplete.JFXAutoComplete
Return true if the dictionnary accept duplicates.
isAcceptingDuplicates() - Method in class org.docgene.help.gui.swing.autocomplete.JAutoComplete
Return true if the dictionnary accept duplicates.
isArticle(URL) - Method in class org.docgene.help.model.ArticlesModel
Return true if an URL correspond to an article.
isArticle() - Method in class org.docgene.help.utils.HistoryElement
Return true if this is an article.
isAtLeastVersion(String) - Static method in class org.docgene.help.utils.HelpUtilities
Return true if the current Java version is at least equal to the specified version.
isDefaultLocale() - Method in class org.docgene.help.locale.Localization
Return true if the locale is the default locale.
isFullTextSearchCompressed() - Method in class org.docgene.help.model.ArticlesModel
Return true if the full text search index must be compressed (the level is greater or equal to 2).
isHTML(URL) - Static method in class org.docgene.help.utils.HelpUtilities
 
isHTTP(URL) - Static method in class org.docgene.help.utils.HelpUtilities
Return true if an URL use the http protocol.
isHTTPProtocol(URL) - Static method in class org.docgene.help.utils.HelpUtilities
Return true if the protocol is a http, or https protocol.
isJarProtocol(URL) - Static method in class org.docgene.help.utils.HelpUtilities
Return true if the protocol is a jar protocol.
isRelative(URL, URL) - Static method in class org.docgene.help.utils.HelpUtilities
Return the path of an URL relative to a directory.
isShowingSearchExceptions() - Method in class org.docgene.help.AbstractHelpContentViewer
Returen true if the first exception possibly encountered during the search must be shown.
isShowingSearchExceptions() - Method in class org.docgene.help.gui.swing.AbstractSwingEngineManager
Returen true if the first exception possibly encountered during the search must be shown.
isShowingSearchExceptions() - Method in interface org.docgene.help.HelpContentViewer
Returen true if the first exception possibly encountered during the search must be shown.
isShown() - Method in class org.docgene.help.gui.jfx.JFXSearchPane
Return true if the Search panel is shown.
isShown() - Method in class org.docgene.help.gui.swing.JFXSearchPane
Return true if the Search panel is shown.
